168 E0500B_BHVR_INTRFR_CARE_CD E0500B_BHVR_INTRFR_CARE_CD E0500B Behavior Impact on Resident: Interferes With Care CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the identified symptoms (physical, verbal or other behavioral symptoms) interfered with the resident's care.
